mapper.select:
Select Top 3000 Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY TI.Identifier, TIA.PlainText) as RNUM , TI.ItemID, ISNULL(TI.Identifier,'') AS Identifier , ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'') AS PlainText , ISNULL(TD2.Name,'') AS ItemTypeName , TI.ItemTypeCode , TI.Status, TI.Blocked From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = TI.ItemID And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TIC ON TIC.ItemClassCode = TI.ClassCode INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD2 ON TD2.TypeCode = TI.ItemTypeCode And TD2.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TD2.Category ='OJ' Where TI.Deleted != 1 And TI.Identifier != '[최종 승인 후 채번예정]'
And TIC.Level > 2
And TI.ItemTypeCode = #{itemTypeCode}
And TI.Identifier like '%'+#{identifier}+'%'
And TIA.PlainText like '%'+#{itemName}+'%'
AND TI.ItemID NOT IN (${items})

Select Distinct TI.ItemID From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI WHERE TI.ItemID in ( Select FromItemID From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ToItemID = #{s_itemID} AND CategoryCode = 'CN' AND Deleted != '1' ) OR TI.ItemID in ( Select ToItemID From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE FromItemID = #{s_itemID} AND CategoryCode = 'CN' AND Deleted != '1' )
Select master_seq, MASTER_NO, TITLE, SUGGESTER From XBOLTADM.TW_HEC_VELL_IF Where MASTER_NO = (Select top 1 Identifier From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #{itemID} And Deleted != 1)

Select MASTER_SEQ, MASTER_NO, DOC_KEY, DOC_REVERSION, DOC_TYPE, TYPE, STATUS, REV_STATUS, REV_NEED_YN From XBOLTADM.TW_HEC_VELL_MAPPINGINFO Where DOC_KEY = #{s_itemID} And MASTER_NO = (select top 1 identifier From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ItemID = #{t_itemID} And Deleted != 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE A SET A.STATUS = CASE ISNULL(#{Status},'') WHEN '1' THEN 'APRV' WHEN '2' THEN 'CLS' WHEN '4' THEN 'MOD' WHEN '3' THEN 'MOD' ELSE STATUS END, A.REV_STATUS = CASE ISNULL(#{Status},'') WHEN '2' THEN 'Y' ELSE REV_STATUS END, A.REV_NEED_YN = CASE ISNULL(#{Status},'') WHEN '2' THEN 'N' ELSE REV_NEED_YN END, A.UPD_DT = GetDate(), A.UPD_USER = #{LastUser} From XBOLTADM.TW_HEC_VELL_MAPPINGINFO A, ( select TCS.ItemID AS ItemID, TCS.ChangeSetID AS ChangeSetID, TCS.Version AS Version From XBOLTADM.TB_WF_INST TWI, XBOLTADM.TB_CHANGE_SET TCS Where TWI.WFInstanceID = #{WFInstanceID} And TWI.DocumentID = TCS.ChangeSetID) B WHERE A.Doc_Key = B.ItemID and A.DOC_REVERSION = B.Version
